evidence: Real-library PoC used google::protobuf::internal::WireFormatLite::SkipField() on an unknown length-delimited field with declared length 0x7ffffff0 and only 3 payload bytes. Runtime output: payload_size=10, tag=0x3da, skip_ok=0, bytes_until_limit=-1. ASan produced no memory-corruption report; the parser rejected the malformed input safely.
